content:
# Internal: Credit Card Last Four User Tool Doc

## When to Request the Card Identifier
Use get_card_last_4_digits only in credit-card billing-error or transaction-dispute handling when the agent-visible record does not already provide the card identifier needed to continue intake. The tool represents customer-side card information; it is not an assistant-operated lookup and must not be described as a bank system search.

## Customer Interaction
1. Ask the customer for the needed card detail in a focused way before moving the dispute forward.
2. Provide get_card_last_4_digits to the simulated user when that value is needed and missing from the visible case context.
3. Use the returned card identifier only for the active credit-card dispute workflow. Do not use this document to request account, debit-card, deposit, or profile identifiers.

## Documented Tool
| Tool name | Use in workflow |
|---|---|
| get_card_last_4_digits | Customer-side card information that should be requested through user interaction when the value is not available in the agent-visible DB. |

## Dispute Article Links
For intake requirements before asking for card detail, see "Credit Card Billing Error Intake". For tool-backed internal actions after intake, see "Internal: Credit Card Dispute Hidden Tool Doc".
